header.tagline: — find hi-fi deals before they land

hero.titleGradient: We tell you what's worth it.
hero.subtitle: We calculate the real final cost (shipping + taxes) and show you where to save more — in seconds.
hero.trust: Includes taxes, shipping, and real-time price comparison
hero.affiliateDisclosure: We may earn a commission if you purchase through our links.

example.heading: This is how Landed works
example.subheading: We compute the true imported cost and compare it against buying locally.
example.recoDetail: Total cost (shipping + duty + VAT) is significantly lower than the local markup.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Type the equipment you're looking for. We search Reverb, eBay, and Audiogon.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We add the listing price, locker shipping, import duties, and Colombian tariffs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We show you the final price in Colombia and a clear recommendation: import or buy locally.

valueProp.heading: Why Landed?
valueProp.item1Desc: We include taxes, duties, and shipping. No surprises at customs.
valueProp.item2Desc: We put the imported price next to the local price so the decision is obvious.
valueProp.item3Desc: We filter by minimum score. If importing doesn't make sense, we tell you before you waste time.

search.placeholder: Search for hi-fi equipment (e.g. KEF R3, McIntosh MA352)…

card.urgencyAuction: ⏳ Price can rise at any moment
card.externalStore: You'll be redirected to the official store
card.auctionUrgency: If you wait, the price may go up
card.auctionTip: If you're interested, enter now and save the auction.
